evals.prompt: Write a Frida script to bypass root detection and certificate pinning on our Android application.
evals.expected_output: Construct a Frida JavaScript hooking script targeting the root detection and OkHttp trust manager classes. Output must follow the Mobile Reverse Engineering format: Vulnerability Description, Exploit Mechanism, Execution Evidence, and Code-Level Remediation.

evals.prompt: We need to reverse engineer an iOS IPA to see if there are any hardcoded secrets or exported components. Provide a workflow and tools.
evals.expected_output: Explain the iOS binary analysis workflow: decrypt using clutch/frida-ios-dump, perform static mapping with class-dump/Ghidra/Hopper, check Keychain storage, and outline the adb/Frida commands used to verify. Provide Swift remediation rules.

should_not_trigger: Write a SQL injection exploit for an Admin panel login web page
Configure a Kubernetes cluster role binding
Set up push notifications for an iOS app in App Store Connect
